name: CleanShot X
description: All-in-one macOS screenshot, screen recording, GIF, and annotation tool by MacPaw — built-in cloud sharing.

seo.title: CleanShot X — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: CleanShot X: All-in-one macOS screenshot, screen recording, GIF, and annotation tool by MacPaw — built-in cloud sharing.

when_to_use: Annotated bug screenshots shared via cloud link instantly
Screen recording for async design review walkthroughs
GIF demos of product features for marketing content
Pixel-perfect screenshot comparison for UI QA testing
Scrolling capture of full-page web content for docs

cons: Overkill for users happy with cmd-shift-4
review.verdict: If screenshots are core to your work, CleanShot X is worth every dollar over stock macOS tools.
review.best_for: Designers, writers, and support folks who share screenshots dozens of times daily
review.not_for: Light screenshot users content with native macOS shortcuts
